records.summary: Measurement residual output that shows how much observed data still disagrees with the current transformed prediction.
records.dejargonized_summary: Expose the mismatch between what the current latent model predicted and what was actually observed so the pipeline can decide whether the transform is still explaining the data well enough.

heuristic.dejargonized_meaning: The transformation output still carries structured residual behavior that should not be ignored.

provenance_notes: The residual is computed as observed output minus transformed prediction for the same step.
Persistent structure in this residual supports validation or stage replacement across estimation-style families.
uncertainty_notes: One residual snapshot is rarely decisive; repeated structure matters more than isolated mismatch.

references.title: Kalman measurement update reference implementation
references.citation: Residual calculation used by the filter measurement oracle.
references.note: Source-backed metadata for cross-family residual evidence.

uncertainty_notes: Residual structure should be interpreted with the current uncertainty model, not as a standalone correctness verdict.
